title: Counter-Signed Conformance Badge Envelope
description: A neutral lab's counter-signature (trust-ladder rung 2) wrapping a runtime's signed badge. See SPEC.md §12.

payload.title: Counter-Signed Payload
payload.description: What the lab's countersignature commits to: the exact inner badge plus the attestation method.

schema_version.description: Counter-signed payload schema version. Bound to SPEC.md §12.

badge.description: The runtime's own signed badge, unaltered.

method.description: verified = lab confirmed the inner signature and counts only; lab-rerun = lab re-ran the suite (§12).
